title: Report Plan Outcome Response
description: Response from reporting an action outcome. Only returned to the orchestrator (buyer-side agent) that manages the plan. Sellers report delivery data via check_governance with phase 'delivery', not via this task.

outcome_id.description: Unique identifier for this outcome record.

status.description: 'accepted' means state updated with no issues. 'findings' means issues were detected.

committed_budget.description: Budget committed from this outcome. Present for 'completed' and 'failed' outcomes.

findings.description: Issues detected. Present only when status is 'findings'.

category_id.description: Which validation category flagged the issue.

plan_summary.description: Updated plan budget state. Present for 'completed' and 'failed' outcomes.

total_committed.description: Total budget committed across all campaigns in the plan.
